title: Oracle (Viper)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Oracle3.jpg|thumb|right|250px|''Oracle'' launches from the [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']].]]
'''''Oracle''''' is the name of a group of [[Viper probe droid/Legends|viper probe droids]] that were in the service of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in the year [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].

==History==
''Oracle'' was stationed aboard the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']] and commanded by its captain, [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Garreth Holtz]]. After the Imperial victory at the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] in 3 ABY, Admiral Holtz was assigned to track down and destroy the [[Defiance Task Force]], a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] fleet assigned to escort the survivors from [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] to safe airspace. Holtz hoped to do this by deploying viper probe droids to scan outer space for the fleet's location, and Probe Group ''Oracle'' was one of the probe groups assigned to this task.

When the [[Corrupter Task Force]] deployed their probes, they were attacked by a pair of [[A-wing]]s from the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Defiance/Legends|''Defiance'']] whose assignment was to eliminate these probes. At least five probes from ''Oracle'' were launched from the ''Corrupter'', but all of them were destroyed by [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
